source_text:
Hi team,

Following up on our planning meeting. Here's what we agreed:

Phase 1 (Jan-Feb):
- Research: Conduct user interviews (5 minimum) by Jan 20
- Design: Create wireframes based on research findings by Feb 3
- Tech: Evaluate three framework options and present recommendation by Jan 27

Phase 2 (Mar-Apr):
- Development: Build MVP with core features (auth, dashboard, reporting)
- Testing: Set up automated test suite
- Launch: Beta launch to 100 users by Apr 15

Please confirm your assignments.

Thanks,
Project Manager
